items.title: Russia unleashes huge bombardment of Kyiv
items.description: Attack of 74 missiles and nearly 500 drones follows Zelenskyy’s warning that Moscow is preparing ‘massive strike’

items.title: OpenAI proposes handing Trump administration 5% stake
items.description: Sam Altman’s start-up in early talks for a public ownership deal as political pressure rises

items.title: The economics of women’s weight
items.description: A new study suggests weight-loss drugs help women find work — and prompt men to leave their partners

items.title: Can Kevin Warsh tame the Fed’s $7tn balance sheet?
items.description: Pragmatism, not ideology, should be the guide

items.title: Trump’s billion-dollar makeover of Washington DC
items.description: The US president calls it a ‘gift’ to the nation. Critics say he is racing past checks to stamp his mark on the capital

items.title: Sony is first console giant to stop making physical games
items.description: Move sparks angry response from some gamers

items.title: White House accelerates plans for AI model standards
items.description: Guidance to be announced as soon as next week after government intervention in Anthropic and OpenAI rollouts

items.title: Trump made up to $1.4bn in stock purchases in 2025
items.description: FT analysis shows US president declared more than 22,000 share transactions last year

items.title: US opts not to renew Trump’s trade deal with Mexico and Canada
items.description: Washington will instead hold annual reviews on terms of commerce with its biggest trading partners
